name: construction project controllers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For construction project controllers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: Inaccurate reconciliation of subcontractor invoices with project budgets
